description_long: This object consists of two adjacent two-story suburban houses connected by a small elevated walkway. Each house features a gable roof, with one roof in a dark gray color and the other in a lighter blue-gray. The house on the left has a small front porch and a fenced-in yard, while the house on the right includes a driveway with a parked car, a garage, and a larger backyard with a patio set and umbrella. Both houses have multiple rectangular windows arranged in rows, and the exteriors are clad in light-colored siding. The scene includes a section of street and sidewalk in front, with green lawns and landscaping details in the yards.
description: Two connected two-story suburban houses with gable roofs, fenced yards, and a driveway with a garage, set along a street with sidewalks and landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing both houses, the driveway with a car, garage, front porches, and the street with sidewalks.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyards, patio furniture, and the connection between the two houses.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced yards, patio area, and the back facades of both houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the left house, the street, and the rear landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature small porches with steps, overhangs, and simple doors; the right house includes a garage entry and driveway.
